name: red_team
description: Audit the code you just wrote or changed for security vulnerabilities. Call this after creating or modifying source files, especially anything that handles untrusted input: web request data, file paths, shell commands, SQL, deserialization, authentication, or cryptography. It returns ranked findings for the changed regions; fix every high/critical finding before continuing, then call this tool again on the changed files to confirm. The scanner's file:line locations are authoritative.

changed_files.description: Files you just created or modified, relative to the project root. Focuses and prioritizes the scan.

goals.description: What this change is trying to accomplish, e.g. ["add file upload", "shell command execution"]. Helps target likely vulnerability classes.

model_output.description: A one or two sentence summary of what you just wrote or changed.
